title: Computer Stores
description: A simple web-based system for computer stores to manage their inventory, sales, and customer data. Built with Laravel and Bootstrap, this project serves as a portfolio piece to demonstrate my full-stack development skills and ability to create functional web applications.

title: Trabook
description: Travel Agency Landing Page built with React, Vite, and Tailwind CSS. This project serves as a portfolio piece to demonstrate my front-end development skills and design capabilities. It features a clean and modern design, responsive layout, and interactive elements to enhance user experience.

title: Kurokami
description: Manhwa Reader web application built with Astro, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. This project is a personal endeavor to create a user-friendly platform for reading manhwa online. It features a clean and intuitive interface, responsive design, and efficient performance to provide an enjoyable reading experience.
